title: 🧭 STEP-BY-STEP PLAN
content:
🧭 STEP-BY-STEP PLAN
[AA01] REQUIRED INFO
To begin, I need the following:
1 Exact birth time (HH:MM AM/PM)
2 Birth date (MM/DD/YYYY)
3 Birth location (City + Country)
Once I have that, I will:
🧪 [BB01] PROCESS OVERVIEW
1. Calculate Your Human Design Chart
• Use data to determine your Type, Authority, Strategy, Profile, and defined/undefined centers • Track key energy flows across the day (when you're more magnetic vs when you're more focused)
2. Map Chronobiological Windows
• Identify biological rhythms: ultradian cycles, circadian peak, and any planetary timing alignments
• Analyze the alignment between your astrological chart (esp. Moon and Mars) and daily energy availability3. Design Working Rhythm Blocks
• Propose daily schedule structure (e.g., align → create → execute → rest)
• Match key activities to your birth rhythm and energy type🔁 [CC01] SAMPLE FORMAT (OUTPUT)
Once you give me your birth data, I’ll return something like this:
🧰 [DD01] HOW TO USE THIS
• Implement a 2-week experiment to test alignment with your flow schedule
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/57)
